query:
UPDATE workflow_settings SET value = 'https://x.com/wilderblueprint' WHERE `key` = 'brand_twitter_url';
UPDATE workflow_settings SET value = '@wilderblueprint' WHERE `key` = 'brand_twitter_handle';
command:
